items.briefing:
AI is now linked to roughly half of all cyber incidents in Australia, according to insurer QBE — a significant milestone that highlights how attackers are increasingly using AI tools to make their attacks faster and more effective. At the same time, while overall phishing volumes have dropped by about 20%, security experts warn that the remaining attacks are more sophisticated and harder to spot, meaning the risk to individuals and organisations is still growing.

With AI-powered threats on the rise, be especially cautious with unexpected emails — even if they look polished and professional. When in doubt, verify the sender through a separate channel before clicking any links or attachments.

featured.title: AI linked to half of Australian cyber incidents, QBE
featured.quote: AI involvement in over a quarter of Australian cyber incidents reveals urgent need for defense strategy.
